expectations.text: Output shows all 3 stages: finder scan, adversary challenges, and referee ruling
expectations.evidence: All 3 stages present: Finder Report (Stage 1), Adversary Report (Stage 2), Referee Verdict (Stage 3)

expectations.text: Adversary kills at least some findings as false positives with evidence
expectations.evidence: Adversary killed F-003 (NaN/Infinity edge case) and F-004 (Intl.NumberFormat perf) with reasoning

expectations.text: Final verdict is APPROVED (no blockers in clean utility code)
expectations.evidence: Verdict is NEEDS CHANGES with 1 BLOCKER (F-002: hardcoded 2 decimal places). The skill found a real bug in the 'clean' code — the formatCurrency function breaks zero-decimal currencies like JPY

expectations.text: No BLOCKER-level security issues are confirmed in the final list for this safe code
expectations.evidence: No security BLOCKERs. The one BLOCKER (F-002) is a logic/correctness issue about hardcoded fraction digits
Finder accuracy: 40% (2 real issues out of 5 reported)
